overview: Hormone Wellness MD specializes in hormonal health for women using functional medicine to identify root causes of imbalance. The practice offers both hormone-based and hormone-free botanical treatment options personalized to each patient.
highlights: Functional medicine approach examining gut health, detoxification, and immune systems
Botanical hormone-free options, including options safe for cancer survivors
Specialized expertise in menopausal medicine and sexual medicine
targetAudience: Midlife women seeking personalized, root-cause-focused care for hormonal imbalance.
